sources.evidence: Domino's official Upchuck artist page links the Facebook profile ID that resolves to this canonical Upchuck ATL profile.
FLOOD's 13 January 2026 feature interviews vocalist KT Thompson and drummer Chris Salado about Upchuck's politics and I'm Nice Now.
The official channel's Popular ordering identifies Forgotten Token as its most-viewed official music video, showing 138K views at verification time.
